headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co reports record quarterly revenue, up 3% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue indicates strong current performance, which is positive for the company's financial outlook.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
